name: Blue Sentinel
description: Grants mana regen and reduced ability cooldowns. Usually taken by the jungler or mid laner first.

name: Red Brambleback
description: Grants bonus damage and slows on hit. Very strong for junglers who fight a lot.

name: Gromp
description: A tanky solo monster hiding in the corner of the jungle, usually the first camp cleared.

name: Murk Wolves
description: A pack of wolves led by a larger alpha wolf.

name: Razorbeaks
description: A flock of raptors that swarm quickly if not handled carefully.

name: Krugs
description: A rock camp that splits into smaller krugs when the big one dies.

name: Scuttle Crab
description: Grants vision and gold, found in the river. Contested by both junglers.

name: Rift Herald
description: A powerful early-game epic monster that helps push down turrets.

name: Baron Nashor
description: The most powerful epic monster, granting a game-changing buff to the whole team.

name: Elemental Drake
description: Grants a permanent elemental buff to the team that kills it.
